title: Silicone Collapsible Colander Sieve, Kitchen Foldable Colander Silicone Strainer, Environmentally Friendly Non-Toxic Easy to Clean.
features: FITS MOST SINK SHAPES AND SIZES: 1 sizes strainers and colanders, suitable for most food cleansing and filtration. including 4-quart colander.

SPACE SAVING DESIGN: Colander are foldable, so they do not take up much needed room in your kitchen cupboards. Stack it on your other kitchen tools in your cupboard or place it standing up on the side and keep your space tidy. Keep your kitchen clean and tidy.

STURDY DESIGN AND FDA APPROVED: The colander made from non-toxic materials, BPA free and fully FDA approved for consumer health & safety. The strainer’s convenient and ergonomic design will make cooking easier than ever as it has non-slip handles for perfect stability.

MULTIPURPOSE TOOLS OF YOUR FAMILY: Works for draining most foods like spaghetti, pasta, potatoes, broccoli, green beans, carrots, spinach and other veggies. Use these strainers to rinse your salad leafs, fruits and fresh vegetables.

BEST COLANDER FOR YOUR KITCHEN: These premium strainers and colanders let you wash, rinse, shake out, and even serve fresh foods quickly, easily and without the mess. Drain holes are distributed evenly, and draining of fruits and vegetables is quick and easy. dishwasher safe, heat resistant to 230º F.
description: Product Dimensions: ---Colander: 11.41*8.66*3.38 inches / Folded height: 1.3 inches Product Features: ---Includes 1 size colanders, suitable for most food cleansing and filtration. including 4-quart colander. ---FDA-APPROVED and BPA Free, composed of non-toxic rubber base and handle, and green silicone, much easier to be opened and collapsed than others with silicone base, very firmly. 100% safe for your food and your family. ---Heat-resistant up to 230ºF, can be quickly immersed into boiling water blanch vegetables like spinach, broccoli, green beans etc. (Note: don't use it as a steamer in a pot ) ---Comfortable handles, designed with your health and convenience in mind, your experience with them will be safe, and the comfortable handles will make your job in the kitchen even more convenient. ---Space-Saving Design, when strainers folded, these colanders are less than 1.6” tall, making it very easy to store them in a kitchen drawer or a cupboard. ---Good helper in kitchen, works for most food cleansing and filtration, like rinsing and draining spaghetti, pasta, potatoes, broccoli, green beans, carrots, spinach and other veggies. ---This collapsible colander can be used in or over a sink and freestanding on a counter or table. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning. Note: ---Please don't heat it on the flame directly. ---Please don't use it as a steamer in a pot. ---Avoid Using Sharp Thorn, Cut Basket Surface. ---Using Ordinary Detergent or Cleaner, Dishwasher Safe. ---Put them Boiling Water for 5 Minutes Before First Use.
